recentTweets.text: Said what I said 🤷‍♂️

More corruption, criminality, and grifting in the Trump administration.

Shocking!

14 million kids in America are food insecure—a terrible problem that gets worse during the summer when school is out of session & they don’t have access to nutritious school meals. Thankfully, incredible programs like #SummerEats are stepping in to help feed hungry kids! https://t.co/hHR0eUwFor

Find a #SummerEats site near you:

https://t.co/2NkpagA4ZM
Radical right-wing MAGA terrorists violently attacked the police protecting @SecRubio in an attempt to overthrow the Constitution during a failed coup.
Fascists love “the people” so much they’re letting Trump’s ICE incels shoot Americans in the street in broad daylight.
This is not complicated. The American People don’t want their tax dollars used to fund a genocide, slaughter innocent civilians, or commit war crimes. https://t.co/lvokxsCj7w
(unless it’s the president or his family)
RT @Acyn: Maybe they should’ve waited till tomorrow to get rid of the teleprompter guy https://t.co/zweEmFGdm4

Trump is CRASHING OUT because his lousy economy, endless war & countless betrayals of America First are unbelievably unpopular. For 6 years his rigged election LIES have been exhaustingly debunked. His own lawyers admitted they made it all up. He’s just a pathetic sore loser.

Trump says Democrats forgot to rig the election in 2016, successfully rigged it while *he* was president in 2020, then forgot how to rig it again in 2024. So the only election Democrats supposedly stole was the one he himself controlled.

You have to be a special kind of stupid
Preparing for when Netflix makes a documentary about the most dysfunctional workplace in America (aka @SpeakerJohnson’s House of Representatives). https://t.co/GSXBgIXZgq
This is why I’m calling for a federal AI data center moratorium. The rich donors who write this garbage for Trump want a nice fat return on their investment.
Trump admits his signature economic policy helped the rich get richer at your expense.
Don’t let Trump’s lies and BS fool you. Consumer prices are near all time highs because of his billionaires-first economic policies, war, and tariffs.

For too long, DC has let Big Ag billionaires call the shots while farmers & families got screwed.

My new bill with @repcasar puts farmers ahead of greedy corporations, lowers grocery prices & rebuilds our food system from the ground up.

Pass the Fair Seeds for Farmers Act! https://t.co/NqDnA9iZhX

Hey @HouseGOP:

Folks know that passing the same voter suppression bill won't lower their rent or bring down the price of groceries.

They know that changing or not changing the clocks won't change what is in their bank account.

Your priorities are way out of whack. https://t.co/uN1DQOCHpE
Spoken like somebody who hasn’t shopped at a grocery store in 30 years.

That’s because your boss briefly stopped bombing the hell out of Iran—a major oil producer.

Now, he’s back at it. And guess what? Gas is going back up.

Trump is making inflation worse and worse.
Weirdos.

NEWS: I’m leading a statement with 25 colleagues who are voting YES on @RepThomasMassie's amendment. For decades, U.S. taxpayers have funded Israeli military operations that have killed civilians & caused humanitarian catastrophes. Enough already.

https://t.co/wYvofPxctw

You want to play that game? You guys are fascists—trying to overturn elections to steal power, killing Americans in the streets, dehumanizing immigrants, handing power to a tyrant, and murdering innocent school girls with your illegal war in Iran.

And by the way—Trump wants the
Trump wants ICE to keep killing people.

A young dad with a toddler in the backseat.

A father of 3 on his way to work.

A mom who had dropped her 6-year-old son off at school.

A VA nurse helping a woman pushed down by masked federal agents.

Enough is enough. Abolish ICE.

Washington lets billionaires write the tax code. Republicans give them one blank check after another without a care in the world. But when it comes to funding our veterans’ hard-earned benefits, MAGA starts pinching pennies. Enough already! https://t.co/TOwlcKKF6E
What the hell does this have to do with the State Department?

Another day in America, another father, mother, son, or daughter shot and killed by ICE—a result of the nearly unlimited funding signed into law by Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans. https://t.co/L01C4s2hM8
Guess I hurt his feelings https://t.co/Av6QRF3QzZ
Susan Collins voted to supercharge ICE funding, and the best she can do is politely call @SecMullinDHS and ask him to stop killing her own constituents.
RT @HouseAgDems: Trump and House Republicans cut SNAP by $187 billion in the Big Ugly Bill last year. Since then, 4.7 million Americans — i…

VFW, our nation’s top veteran advocacy group, called out MAGA for trying to cut veterans benefits for disabled veterans.

The response from House Republicans has been one of the most disgraceful and cowardly things I’ve ever seen. https://t.co/9hkp3mUcJb

Immoral and unconscionable. The International Criminal Court exists to provide justice to victims when countries can’t or won’t. By trying to destroy it, Trump and Rubio seek to give themselves—alongside Putin, Netanyahu, Maduro, and other human rights abusers—impunity for war
You just voted to give these thugs another $70 Billion. You’re complicit in this and every other murder committed by Trump’s secret police.
You mean like when you discussed war plans in your easily-hackable Signal group chat?
By the way—we’re still waiting on that refund for Trump’s illegal tariffs.

I am leading 80 Members of Congress urging @SecMullinDHS to extend protections for Salvadoran TPS holders. Ending TPS for El Salvador would hurt our economy, tear apart families, and send 200,000 lawfully present Salvadorans back to a country where they face potential human

At a packed town hall in Racine, Wisconsin this week hosted by @WeAct4progress and progressive champions talking about how to build a better future for our country. People are sick and tired of a status quo economy built for billionaires and corporate greed. If Republicans are https://t.co/nVyWQomblv

ICE is using the same playbook of lies and propaganda for Lorenzo Salgado Araujo as it did for Renee Goode and Alex Pretti. I support the demands of the Salgado family for a full and transparent investigation. And I want every immigrant family to know that you are not alone and

People know the status quo has failed them time and time again.

Big change is coming. https://t.co/RvB3mkCS59
Still the wrong files.

These days, it’s incredibly rare for Washington to do anything that helps people. This bipartisan affordable housing bill is one of the rare exceptions, but Trump won’t sign it unless Congress lets him rig the midterms.

He’s ALWAYS putting himself above the American People.

Republicans gave these thugs a $170 BILLION slush fund to keep doing this shit.

Abolish ICE NOW! https://t.co/VTZbsO4pDE

I’m sick and tired of the status quo in this country that puts corporate greed & billionaire profits over working people.

In a country with a trillionaire, it’s a moral outrage that children go hungry, seniors can’t afford their medicine, and veterans sleep on the street. https://t.co/ubafsLr2Fa

Six months after the murders of Renee Goode and Alex Pretti—and still no accountability from Republicans. We still have roving bands of unidentified masked agents in unmarked cars empowered by Trump to terrorize our communities. This cannot become normal.

Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was a father to 3 US citizens, a husband, an employer, and a proud immigrant who worked hard for 35 years to achieve the American Dream for his family. He put his kids through college, built thousands of homes, and created dozens of jobs for folks in his
RT @repdeliaramirez: Last night, I joined @RepGwenMoore, @RepMarkPocan, @RepMcGovern, and @RepJayapal for the Progress for the People Town…
Turns out it’s not popular to rip away people’s health insurance so billionaires can get massive tax breaks.
Haven’t heard of that one before.

Government-subsidized grocery stores = Communism

Government run gas stations = Freedom

Got it.

Folks are struggling to feed their families because Trump’s Big Ugly Bill slashed food assistance & his stupid tariffs are sending grocery prices through the roof. 

Thankfully, programs like Summer Eats are stepping in to make sure no kid goes hungry while school is out. So https://t.co/A2TX0iIu0J
THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP! MAGA!!!

Dr. Hussam Abu Safiya, a Palestinian pediatrician, has been languishing in Israeli prisons for 18 months without charge. He’s been beaten & tortured.
 
Israel is violating its obligations under int’l law by continuing his detention. Not one more taxpayer dime should be sent to
I’m gonna go with yes since he just openly admitted it.
Once again, in Trump’s America, committing crimes is fine as long as you tell everyone you’re doing it.

Won’t wear a mask to protect others during a pandemic…

…but will wear a mask to protect themselves from accountability for their radical hate-fueled bigotry.

Cowards.

Great piece from @KenRoth in The Guardian on the state of America in our 250th year: "Trump wants to become king. An imperfect yet powerful system of checks and balances is being deployed to prevent him. The resistance is worth celebrating."
The Big Ugly Bill threw millions of Americans off health insurance. I shared a few of their stories on the House Floor ⬇️ https://t.co/NkLeuFRh1Z
All thanks to Trump’s billionaires-first, workers-last economic policies.
Happy Independence Day. https://t.co/fifT7zSwwH

Yikes. @AustinScottGA08 told me the economy is doing “pretty good.”

…I guess if you hang out at Mar-A-Lago all day, you think things are good. But the people I talk to think they’re getting hosed by Trump’s billionaire-first economic policies, stupid tariffs, & illegal war. https://t.co/t2y8G5FINI

I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. Trump’s solution is to push the American Dream of home ownership even further out of reach. Despicable.

Elections should be decided by the American people—not the rich & powerful.

A big win for the Constitution, the rule of law, and our fundamental freedoms.

81 years ago today, representatives of 50 countries gathered in San Francisco to sign the U.N. Charter.

I am proud that U.N. Charter was signed in the United States.

I am proud that so many Americans have fought for a country that stands up for human rights and lives up to the

It’s shameful that our country has to be called out by the UN for being complicit in the deaths of people in custody. We should be a defender of human rights, not an abuser.

If we can't uphold human rights at home, we forfeit our moral credibility to condemn abuses elsewhere.
“We do a Watergate twice a day” is a crazy way to confess your own corruption… https://t.co/BMwQzEioOM

My thoughts are with all those in Venezuela affected by the two devastating earthquakes yesterday. I welcome the US government’s promise of search and rescue teams and urge robust relief aid. Venezuelans have suffered so much and we owe them our humanitarian support.
